name: Sigma.js (+graphology)
when_to_use: 需要把已有坐标的千到万级关系图用 WebGL 流畅缩放、悬停和检索时用它,而非手写 WebGL——原生在批渲染、拾取和相机变换上失败;非做自动排版的小图,坐标应由 graphology 布局或 elkjs 等 peer 先算出。
why_valuable: AI 默认做不到万级节点的 WebGL 批渲染、GPU/颜色拾取与稳定相机状态;SVG/DOM 在千节点后失速,手写 WebGL 关系图成功率为 0%。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need smooth WebGL zooming, hovering, and search for a relationship graph with existing coordinates and thousands to tens of thousands of nodes, instead of hand-writing WebGL. Native implementations fail on batch rendering, picking, and camera transforms. It is not for small graphs that need automatic layout; compute coordinates first with graphology layouts or a peer such as elkjs.
en.why_valuable: AI cannot provide WebGL batch rendering for tens of thousands of nodes, GPU/color picking, and stable camera state by default. SVG/DOM slows after a thousand nodes, and hand-written WebGL relationship graphs have a 0% success rate.

data_in.note: Sigma natively consumes a graphology Graph. The JSON entry uses the serialized shape from graphology.export()/import(); node attributes.x/y are prerequisites for rendering.

attributes.size?: number - use Sigma's node size by default
attributes.color?: string - use Sigma's node color by default

edges.key?: string - generated by graphology by default

schema.settings?: object - trimmed Sigma Settings entry, default {}

spec.note: Sigma's WebGL canvas needs nonzero container dimensions. The default height is 400px; do not use vh or percentage heights. Node x/y cannot be omitted, and this entry does not run a layout implicitly.

data_in.note: Sigma 原生消费 graphology Graph;JSON 入口采用 graphology.export()/import() 的序列化形状,节点 attributes.x/y 是渲染前置条件。

attributes.size?: number —— 默认使用 Sigma 节点尺寸
attributes.color?: string —— 默认使用 Sigma 节点颜色

edges.key?: string —— 默认由 graphology 生成

schema.settings?: object —— Sigma Settings 裁剪入口,默认 {}

spec.note: Sigma WebGL canvas 需要非零容器尺寸;默认 height 400px,禁用 vh/百分比高。节点 x/y 不可缺省;本条不隐式运行布局。

example._why: Sigma 不负责补布局,minimal 必须同时展示 graphology 序列化字段和节点 x/y。

peer.note: 若输入只有拓扑没有 x/y,先用 elkjs 或 graphology-layout 产坐标再构造本条的 graph;Sigma 本身是渲染器,不替消费 AI 选择布局。

uplink: 默认只做本地关系探索;需要回传节点焦点时由消费 AI 接 Sigma 原生回调,不预设统一事件对象。

carriers.widget: supported:WebGL canvas 完全落 shadow 容器,无 CSS/head/worker/uplink 依赖
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + WebGL;宿主需提供 WebGL 上下文

isolation.evidence: Verified vs jsDelivr sigma@3.0.3: +esm ends `ir=St;export{...St as Sigma,...ir as default}` — the default export IS the Sigma class, so `import Sigma from '.../+esm'` is correct. constructor `(graph: Graph, container: HTMLElement, settings?: Partial<Settings>)` per dist/declarations/src/sigma.d.ts:56 matches `new Sigma(graph, el, data.settings ?? {})`. graphology@0 exports `w as Graph, w as default` so `import Graph from` gets the class; `graph.import(data.graph)` consumes graphology's SerializedGraph and schema fields (attributes?/nodes[{key,attributes{x,y,label?,size?,color?}}]/edges[{key?,source,target,attributes?,undirected?}]) match that canonical format. Isolation: +esm has 0 document.head, 0 createElement('style'), 0 document.body — WebGL canvas lives in the passed container; document mousemove/mouseup/touchend/touchmove + window resize are drag-capture listeners cleaned via 13 removeEventListener (renderer.kill). No style/head/body footprint → shadow-safe (globalEvents yes but non-blocking).
